$comment: GateTest configuration for Crontech. BLK-007 observation sprint. See docs/BUILD_BIBLE.md BLK-007.

unitTests.reason: native bun run test already runs as a separate CI job

e2e.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint — enable once live preview URL is available in CI

visual.reason: visual regressions — the exact class of bug (bunched nav, clipped CORE badge, broken glyphs) that slipped through before BLK-007

links.reason: native bun run check-links already runs as a CI step

documentation.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint — re-enable once internal docs are stable

liveCrawler.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint — enable once a PR preview URL is served in CI (requires BLK-009)

chaos.reason: reserved for BLK-011 CRDT collab production hardening

mutation.reason: too slow for every-PR gating; run manually on major refactors

aiReview.reason: Claude reviews the diff for logic / design / positioning drift. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

fakeFixDetector.reason: catches 'Claude claimed to fix it but didn't' — the exact failure mode from the 14 April 2026 iPad screenshot incident

gating.reason: BLK-007 observation sprint. Flip to 'strict' in the PR that adds GateTest to main branch protection's required-checks list.

rules.documentation.apiDocs: tRPC types serve as the API spec

doctrine.reason: aiReview module cross-references these when grading a diff to detect locked-block violations.
